description_long: This is a vintage automobile with a classic open-top design, featuring a black fabric roof supported by thin metal rods. The body is primarily dark green with black lower panels and white-rimmed spoked wheels, evoking early 20th-century automotive styling. The front of the car is equipped with two large, round brass headlights and a brass radiator grille, while the interior is finished in a light beige color with a simple steering wheel and minimal dashboard controls. The car has a step-up running board along each side and a rear compartment that appears to be for luggage or additional seating. Brass accents are visible on the lamps, horn, and other trim elements, adding to its period authenticity. The overall proportions and details suggest it is modeled after a Ford Model T or a similar early private vehicle.
description: A vintage, open-top car with a black fabric roof, green and black body, brass headlights, and white-rimmed spoked wheels, reminiscent of early 20th-century automobiles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the car's green and black body, white-rimmed wheels, black fabric roof, and brass headlamps.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the brass radiator grille, dual round headlights, and the car's narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the steering wheel and interior seating.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the fabric roof, rear compartment, and the absence of a visible license plate.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual round brass headlights mounted on either side of the radiator grille
